oracle.body: if (!Array.isArray(nodeHeap) || !thisRef || typeof thisRef.ref !== 'number' || typeof n !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; if (n < 0) return { ref: -1 }; let cur = thisRef.ref; if (cur === -1) return { ref: -1 }; if (cur < -1 || cur >= nodeHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; let steps = n; while (steps > 0) { if (cur < 0 || cur >= nodeHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; const node = nodeHeap[cur]; if (!node || typeof node !== 'object' || !('object' in node)) return { ref: -1 }; const nextRef = node.object.fields.next; if (!nextRef || typeof nextRef !== 'object' || typeof nextRef.ref !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; cur = nextRef.ref; steps -= 1; if (cur === -1 && steps > 0) return { ref: -1 }; } if (cur < -1 || cur >= nodeHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; return { ref: cur };
